arts.ttl: Augsburg set to sign Mërgim Berisha; Chrislain Matsima joins permanently
arts.sum: Kicker Magazine's Michael Pfeifer reports that FC Augsburg and TSG 1899 Hoffenheim have ironed out the details of Mërgim Berisha's loan. The Augsburger Allgemeine Zeitung also has new news to report on two other FCA player contracts.

arts.ttl: Confidence of beating Aston Villa to signing – Villans have sent concrete contract offer
arts.sum: RB Leipzig are confident that they will beat Aston Villa to the signing of Tidiam Gomis. That’s according to journalist Florian Plettenberg, who says the German side are confident the 18-year-old SM Caen youngster will be joining them. Gomis is out of contract with the French side this summer. That’s led him to being courted The post Confidence of beating Aston Villa to signing – Villans have sent concrete contract offer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Monaco vs. Aston Villa: Premier League club bidding to end historical club streak
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be bidding to end an historical club streak when they square off against Monaco in the Champions League on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa player’s arrival at new club pushed back again – Delay confusion building
arts.sum: Diego Carlos’ flight to Turkey has again been delayed as his move to Fenerbahçe from Aston Villa continues to stumble. That’s according to journalist Yağız Sabuncuoğlu, who say a new flight plan has now been arranged for the defender. The plan is for him to arrive in Istanbul at 22:00 local time. Fenerbahce have reached The post Aston Villa player’s arrival at new club pushed back again – Delay confusion building appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer allows club to clean up accounts – And then attack January transfer window too
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s move for Andrés García will allow Levante to ‘clean up’ their accounts and even attack the January transfer window. That’s according to El Dia de Cordoba, who report that the Spanish side have secured the ‘most important transfer’ in the Spanish second division. García was confirmed as Aston Villa’s second signing of the The post Aston Villa transfer allows club to clean up accounts – And then attack January transfer window too appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 2024/25 Champions League prize money as Arsenal and Liverpool already bank millions along with Aston Villa
Every word Unai Emery said about winning the Champions League, injuries, Duran, Watkins & Monaco
arts.sum: How we are playing this competition is the most important thing, trying to enjoy each moment; trying to focus on each match; trying to show our capacity and how we can face the best teams in the world. The Champions League is against the best teams in the world and tomorrow we are playing an experienced French club."

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news: Levante defender Andres Garcia completes move to Premier League
arts.sum: Aston Villa formally announce that they have completed the signing of Levante defender Andres Garcia.

arts.ttl: Manager 'really rates' Emiliano Buendia amid Aston Villa transfer links
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke says that Emiliano Buendia is a player who he 'really rates' - but he wouldn't drawn on the immediate future of the Aston Villa playmaker during this January transfer window. Farke worked with Buendia during their days together at Norwich City and he helped mould the player who would eventually cost Villa £33m in the summer of 2021.

arts.ttl: Barry, Duran, pair missing, injury absentees - Aston Villa train before Monaco clash - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: It was a youthful group which Unai Emery oversaw and put through their paces; there remain a number of senior players absent through various injuries and that has meant one or two players from the under 21s joining in training with the first team. Jhon Duran trained as normal ahead of Villa's seventh Champions League fixture of the campaign; the Colombian has been the subject of interest from West Ham United in this January transfer window, but - as he aims to fight his way back into the starting XI which he has dropped out of since Boxing Day - the focus remains on the task at hand.
